title: limonium sinuatum f. leucocalyx
intro: Limonium sinuatum f. leucocalyx, also known as Sea Lavender or White Sea Lavender, is a flowering plant species within the Plumbaginaceae family. It is primarily found in coastal areas and is valued for its medicinal and aromatic properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing stress and improving sleep quality. Limonium sinuatum f. leucocalyx can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible plant for various uses.
